title: All you need: Ice Boat Racing
description: This modpack contains all you need to become a better or the best ice boat racer! In here you will find only the necessary mods making this a super lightweight modpack for all users!
body:
This modpack contains **all you need for ice boat racing** like custom GUIs for a bunch of info on your racing, you will also find mods for better ice boat racing and practicality.

The modpack has a goal of genuinely **improve** your racing skills and making it a better experience!

In here there is a bunch of optimisation mod so you don't lag and mess up your track time.
**So I say give it a try! and see what happens :)**

Here are two servers perfect to **master** your racing skills:

**FROSTHEX**
frosthex.com

**BOATLABS**
mc.boatlabs.net
